prompt: A black-and-white portrait of a jazz musician playing saxophone on a dimly lit stage, creating a nostalgic, timeless feel.
prompt_refined: Generate a black-and-white, medium close-up portrait of a male jazz musician, actively playing a tenor saxophone. The musician should be centrally framed on a dimly lit stage, illuminated by a single, focused overhead spotlight, casting the immediate background into deep shadow. The image should convey a classic, timeless aesthetic with a subtle film grain texture, evoking a strong sense of nostalgia.
